<?php /** * sect163k1 * * PHP version 5 and 7 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2017 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://pear.php.net/package/Math_BigInteger */ namespace phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\Curves; use phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\BaseCurves\Binary; use phpseclib3\Math\BigInteger; class sect163k1 extends Binary { public function __construct() { $this->setModulo(163, 7, 6, 3, 0); $this->setCoefficients( '000000000000000000000000000000000000000001', '000000000000000000000000000000000000000001' ); $this->setBasePoint( '02FE13C0537BBC11ACAA07D793DE4E6D5E5C94EEE8', '0289070FB05D38FF58321F2E800536D538CCDAA3D9' ); $this->setOrder(new BigInteger('04000000000000000000020108A2E0CC0D99F8A5EF', 16)); } }
